narrative.description: FTL: Faster Than Light is a roguelike spaceship management game where a crew races across sectors while managing power, weapons, and hull integrity.
narrative.core_loop: Route through star sectors, allocate power to systems during real-time pausable battles, acquire upgrades and crew, and reach the final sector before the fleet catches you.

mechanics.map_notes: In FTL, connect stations with limited lines as passenger demand grows over time.
mechanics.expression: In FTL, connect stations with limited lines as passenger demand grows over time.

mechanics.map_notes: In FTL, battles resolve in turns with a party of characters selecting commands from menus.
mechanics.expression: In FTL, battles resolve in turns with a party of characters selecting commands from menus.

mechanics.map_notes: In FTL, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.
mechanics.expression: In FTL, limited ammo, healing, and save resources force careful risk assessment.

mechanics.map_notes: In FTL, death ends the current run; meta-progression or knowledge carries between attempts.
mechanics.expression: In FTL, death ends the current run; meta-progression or knowledge carries between attempts.

mechanics.map_notes: In FTL, choose branching paths across a run map with risk-reward nodes.
mechanics.expression: In FTL, choose branching paths across a run map with risk-reward nodes.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience FTL through its core roguelike loop.
